craigslist.title: 1885 Wendell Valley Blvd, Wendell, NC
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 1885 Wendell Valley Blvd, Wendell, NC 1885 Wendell Valley Blvd, Wendell, NC 27591 2295.00 / Month 3 BEDROOMS | 2.5 BATHROOMS Interested? Fill out this form : https://renter.turbotenant.com/general-prescreener/T3duZXI6MTE1NDM2Nw==?property=2595830&source=cl Have questions? Contact the Landlord : https://rental.turbotenant.com/p/1885-wendell-valley-blvd-wendell-nc/79448baa-86e6-4ca1-bc83-4df858576dac?source=craigslist Property Description: New construction 3 bedroom, 2.5 bath, plus flex space Ready for immediate occupancy Key Features **Main-Floor Primary Suite with LVP flooring Features a custom accent wall and an attached tiled bath complete with a convenient built-in shower niche. * Spacious Secondary Bedrooms Two additional upstairs bedrooms connected by a convenient "buddy bath" featuring a double-sink vanity. * Bonus 4th Flex Room A versatile, sun-filled space ideal for a private home office, playroom, gym, hobby room, or massive walk-in closet. * 2 car detached garage with additional driveway parking Modern Gourmet Kitchen Equipped with stylish dual-tone smoky blue and white cabinetry, a gas range, a sleek single-bowl sink, a tile backsplash, and a hidden built-in trash cabinet. Premium Flooring Durable, beautiful luxury vinyl plank (LVP) flooring flows seamlessly throughout the main living areas, the primary suite, and on the stairs Flexible Upstairs Loft A central second-floor loft perfect for a media room, home tech space, or a casual lounge area. Open-Concept Layout Seamless flow from the living area into the spacious kitchen and separate dining room perfect for entertaining. Location, location, location!! -15 mins from downtown Raleigh -5 mins to Hwy 87/264 interchange -5 mins from Treelight Square (Chick Fil A, Chipotle, health care providers, Publix) -2 mins from Wake Med stand alone site -Inside the Wendell Falls community with access to 10 miles of nature trails, community pool, parks/ playgrounds, and 24/7 fitness center (HOA fees included in rent) Property Type : Single Family Pets : No Pets Allowed Smoking : NO Lease Term : 2295.00 / Month 1200.00 Deposit Lease Length: One Year Available: 07/01/2026 Occupancy Limit: 4 People Utilities Included : Appliances : Dishwasher Microwave Refrigerator Washer Range Oven Dryer Amenities : Fitness Center Swimming Pool Heating & Cooling : Forced Air Central Interested? Fill out this form : https://renter.turbotenant.com/general-prescreener/T3duZXI6MTE1NDM2Nw==?property=2595830&source=cl Have questions? Contact the Landlord : https://rental.turbotenant.com/p/1885-wendell-valley-blvd-wendell-nc/79448baa-86e6-4ca1-bc83-4df858576dac?source=craigslist
